blended.narrative: White Pass is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,125 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 49.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 24" over the past week. Current depth: 75".
